title: BEM-841 reset queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:01 (UTC+3)'
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
invalid=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid')
archived=[]
for p in sorted(queue.glob('*.json')):
    target=invalid/(p.name+'.reset.txt')
    target.write_text(p.read_text(errors='ignore')+sep+'--- reset_by ---'+sep+'BEM-841 emergency reset'+sep)
    p.unlink()
    archived.append({'path':str(p),'archived_as':str(target)})
fresh=queue/'bem841_clean_claude_dispatch.json'
fresh.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 clean dispatch after emergency queue reset','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':'dispatch_queue_reset_to_one_valid_item','archived_count':len(archived),'archived':archived,'fresh':str(fresh),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_emergency_reset_dispatch_queue.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_emergency_reset_dispatch_queue.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Emergency Reset Dispatch Queue | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh tick and verify dispatch result, Claude runtime, real response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Queue reset to one valid item. Next: tick and verify proof triad.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_emergency_reset_dispatch_queue.json','governance/reports/bem841_emergency_reset_dispatch_queue.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(fresh)]
for item in archived: changed.append(item['archived_as'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Emergency reset of workflow_dispatch_queue: archived every existing queue JSON and created exactly one clean valid Claude dispatch item')
"""
No issue comments.
